what_went_right: Strong uptrend confirmed by EMA alignment (Ratios of 1.618, confirming the trend)
what_went_wrong: Not enough time for reversal after exit; high risk
reflection.key_lesson: Properly timed exits can mitigate losses even in strong uptrends.
reflection.improvement: Next time, consider placing a stop-loss order at or just above the entry price to lock in profits and avoid significant loss. Also, ensure thorough market analysis before executing trades.
reflection.pattern_identified: Strong uptrend confirmed by EMA alignment (Ratios of 1.618, confirming the trend)
reflection.confidence_assessment: Confidence was appropriate considering the strong uptrend and confirmation indicators, but it could have been higher with more detailed analysis.
reflection.risk_assessment: Risk assessment was thorough; however, the execution timing allowed for a significant loss due to inadequate time for reversal after exiting the market. This highlights the importance of maintaining sufficient time between entry and exit.
